news.paragraph: Broadcom is seeing positive momentum driven by strong AI demand, which has led Citigroup to raise its price target to $500. Traders should monitor the upcoming April quarter earnings report, as analysts suggest the company could beat estimates due to its significant role in the AI sector.
headlines: Citi Says Broadcom (AVGO) Could Beat April Quarter Estimates on AI Strength
Broadcom (AVGO) Is The Biggest Holding in Elon Musk’s Grok AI Chatbot Latest Portfolio
Will Broadcom Inc. (AVGO) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
Get Paid 12% To Buy AVGO At A 30% Discount - Here's How
Citigroup Adjusts Price Target on Broadcom to $500 From $475, Maintains Buy Rating
Citi Raises Broadcom Price Target to $500: AI Demand Sets Up Another Big April Quarter
